system.effect: The Sorcerer draws a protective rune in the air which stops any spell or spell-like effect (including the Sorcerer's own magic) from passing. The barrier extends around the Sorcerer to a radius of 3m. The spell can be dismissed at will, or will last for the duration. Spells with a range of Self or Touch cast by the Sorcerer inside the Ward Rune are not blocked. The Ward Rune can be removed by a Quell Enchantment spell or similar effect or be dismissed by the sorcerer who cast it.
system.critSuccess: The Ward Rune's duration is doubled.
